name: Dex Pixia Prime
description: Take flight with Razorwing and summon these mighty dual pistols.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: The 100% damage bonus now applies to all weapons (including Titania’s Dex Pixia and Diwata) and scales with Ability Strength.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Update 31.7
patchlogs.changes:
Assume the lethal form of a lustrous midnight. This collection includes the Titania Donann skin, Titania Moyturan Wings, the Aerospri Dex Pixia Skin, the Hawth Diwata Skin, and the Raylta Syandana.
Includes the Titania Moyturan Wings, Aerospri Dex Pixia Skin, and Hawth Diwata Skin when purchased.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed two different weapon sounds being heard when firing Titania’s Dex Pixia with the Hawkmoth Skin equipped.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed firing and reload animations for Titania’s Hawkmoth Skin for her Dex Pixia exalted weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes: The trappings of royalty. Includes the deluxe Titania Empress Skin, Hawkmoth Skin for the Dex Pixia exalted weapon, the Mot Skin for the Diwata sword, Titania’s Heartwood Armor Set and the Dendrite Gunblade Skin.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s Dex Pixia not being equipped if Razorwing is cast while holding an Arch-Gun.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Titania’s Dex Pixia muzzle flash scale.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes:
Titania’s Dex Pixia + Diwata
Titania’s Dex Pixia now uses Secondary Mods! More on that in the Titania Exalted Weapons Dev Workshop we posted at the beginning of this week.

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.changes: Rifle Amp and Shotgun Amp Auras now apply to Titania’s Dex Pixia weapons.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the camera shake on Dex Pixia but added intro aim deviation to keep the same balance.
